dotflat

Dotflat documentation

This documentation is designed to help you start dealing with Dotflat. It covers Dotflat as a concept, explains the main ways to utilize Dotflat, more detailed information about smart contracts of the system and advanced topics for more complex applications and use cases.

    • Dotflat
    • Interest DAO

      • Why is it stable?
      • What is an indicative price?
      • What is the stabilization fund and how it is refilled?
      • Were does annual interest on deposit come from?
      • What if stabilization fund is empty?
      • What if stabilization fund is empty?
